name: Spicy Thai Chicken and Coconut Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 Habanero Chiles, stems removed, finely chopped
1 Jalapeno Chile, stem removed, finely chopped
4 Thai Chiles, stems removed, finely chopped
1 Poblano Chile, stem removed, finely chopped
1 Green New Mexican Chile, stem removed, finely chopped
1 1/2 lb Skinless, Boneless Chicken Breast, julienne into 1/2 inch thick strips
1 1/2 tsp to 2 ts Rice Wine Vinegar
1 cup Whole Kernel Corn or Baby Corn, sliced
1/2 bn Fresh Cilantro, stems removed, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large soup pot, add the oil.
2. Add the onions, lemongrass, and all the peppers and chiles; sauté until soft, stirring frequently.
3. Add the ginger, garlic, and mushrooms; reduce heat and continue to saute for 10 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat and stir in the coconut milk, stock, and chicken. Heat very slowly, but do not allow the soup to boil! Simmer until the chicken is just tender.
5. Add the remaining ingredients, garnish with a couple of Thai chiles if desired, and serve.
